scientific_scope: This is a Phase 1 A4 privileged train-time-only implementation smoke only.

The smoke checks scalp feature extraction, training-only normalization, training-only gate/weight fitting, training-only privileged proxy fitting, privileged-output generation for training rows, student fitting, logits, metrics and artifact writing.
The privileged path is an internal proxy for implementation checks, not final iEEG privileged evidence.

No held-out outer-test subject may participate in normalization, gate/weight fitting, privileged proxy fit, privileged outputs for student fit, student fit, calibration, threshold or tuned QC fitting.
Student inference uses scalp features only and does not consume privileged or teacher-side outputs at test time.
No headline claim is permitted from this smoke output.
